title: Heritage Wrench — Ochre
summary: Heritage wrench in ochre; built in Vietnam for daily use.

content.text:
# Heritage Wrench — Ochre

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Heritage Wrench — Ochre is designed for the long haul, with tools-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Vietnam.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.
{"weight_g":1412,"materials":{"upper":"full-grain leather","sole":"oak-tanned leather","lining":"vegetable-tanned calfskin"},"care":"wipe with a damp cloth","made_in":"Vietnam","length_cm":11}
